name: Beth Hansen
subject: 3 opportunities
body:
There are three upcoming opportunities for you to tune in live
and learn more about Gov. John Kasich's record of accomplishment
and plans to make America safer and stronger.

Peter, there are three upcoming
opportunities for you to tune in live and learn more about Gov.
John Kasich's record of accomplishment and plans to make America
safer and stronger.

CNN Special w/ John, Karen, Emma
& Reese Kasich
Monday, April 11th - 9:00PM EDT
Watch Live: CNN

Fox News Town Hall w/ Sean
Hannity
Monday, April 11th - 10:00PM EDT
Watch Live: Fox News

Gov. John Kasich Speech - "Two
Paths"
Tuesday, April 12th - 10:30AM EDT
Watch Live:
JohnKasich.com/TwoPaths

We're 98 days away from the
convention and eight days from the New York Primary.

It's critical that we finish
strong in these states to go into the convention with the wind at
our backs!

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Help grow our momentum! Thank
you.

Beth Hansen
Campaign Manager
JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Official Donna for Senate Campaign
subject: Commit to vote for Donna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend,
**[In three days, early voting for the April 26th primary begins. Confirm your early vote location and commit to vote today.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff3/767134fb/5c6ca8ff/4338e580/3082564519/VEsH/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/content/vote")**
With every rally, town hall, and neighborhood meeting, Donna's done her part to reach every corner of the state with her progressive message. **Now winning this tough race comes down to every supporter getting to the polls.**
This is our opportunity to build a Senate that fights for the people. We can't afford to sit back now.
**Commit to vote now and remind your family and friends to join you:**
**[http://donnaedwardsforsenate.com/vote](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff3/767134fb/5c6ca8ff/4338e580/3082564519/VEsE/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/content/vote")**
Thanks for making your voice heard,
Official Donna Edwards for Senate Campaign
**[](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff3/767134fb/5c6ca8ff/4338e581/3082564519/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDExLU1ERVYiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160411-MDEV&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
** **
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you would like to receive less email, please [click here](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff3/767134fb/5c6ca8ff/4338e59e/3082564519/VEsC/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/receive-less-email"). If you would like to contribute to Donna's campaign to be Maryland's next Senator [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff3/767134fb/5c6ca8ff/4338e59f/3082564519/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaWDE5IjoiZW0yMDE2MDQxMS1NREVWIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dfesplash?refcode=footer_em20160411-MDEV") If you want to learn more about Donna, please visit [www.donnaedwardsforsenate.com](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff3/767134fb/5c6ca8ff/4338e59c/3082564519/VEsA/ "http://donnaedwardsforsenate.com"). Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails from the Donna Edwards for Senate Campaign, please [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74fefff3/767134fb/5c6ca8ff/4338e59d/3082564519/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
Donna Edwards for Senate
P.O Box 44305
Ft. Washington, MD 20749

****
************

name: Team Sestak
subject: URGENT: first false $1 million dollar attack ad airs tomorrow
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e07/2526350558/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Tomorrow, an outside special interest group supporting Joe's primary election opponent begins airing a negative ad falsely attacking Joe. Despite the fact that Congressman Sestak was, is, and will always be a proven fighter for preserving and expanding Social Security and Medicare, **this outside interest group said it is putting up a $1 million TV ad making false claims that have already been proven inaccurate by independent fact-checkers. ** [Please help Joe push back with a rebuttal ad - based on the true facts listed below - by directly funding our response ad with $10, $25, $100, whatever you can do now, please... as this takes funds away from our positive ads!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e06/2526350558/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FBp1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e05/2526350558/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FBb1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
_These are the facts:_
* **" Not ****accurate** " said ABC's WTAE Action News 4 in Pittsburgh after "digging into the truth behind the claims" about Joe's record on Social Security and Medicare.
* WGAL in Lancaster **agreed with ABC 's assessment that the claims are false.**
* The _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ said the allegation was **" plainly misleading."**
* In fact, the _Post-Gazette_ said **" Mr. Sestak's answer did not [even] mention Social Security"** as the group claims it did.
* And Philadelphia NPR affiliate WHYY agreed with the _Post-Gazette_ , finding that** "Sestak didn't actually talk about Social Security in the interview in question."**

Peter, again, please help Joe push back as we must unfortunately take funds from our positive ads to now counter the negative one that is falsely misrepresenting Joe's integrity of service to the people of Pennsylvania. [We ask you to chip in the maximum amount you are able so that we can respond tomorrow!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e04/2526350558/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FBp2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e03/2526350558/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FBb2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
Warmly,
Team Sestak

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e02/2526350558/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e01/2526350558/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e00/2526350558/VEsO/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af8/3476a20e/d8a4423/27422e0f/2526350558/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: "prostituted"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
**" Why win a seat, but you have to win it through a prostituted way?"
\-- Primary opponent Joe Sestak on Katie's campaign for U.S. Senate**

UNBELIEVABLE! **[Fight back against this inflammatory comment by making sure Katie wins on Primary Day. Donate now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/3114869282748497920/3977264510665752576?refcode=e20160411&refcode2=e20160411nd&amount=25)**
Friend, that's what our primary opponent Joe Sestak said about Katie's campaign on Friday.

This sexist and offensive comment has no place in this race. Joe Sestak should be ashamed.

**With just two weeks to go, Katie needs your urgent support right now to fight back and win on Primary Day.[Make an immediate donation right now: Every person who chips in shows the strength of our campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3114869282748497920/3977264510665752576?refcode=e20160411&refcode2=e20160411nd&amount=25)**

We've grown this grassroots campaign from the ground up, and we're proud of what we've accomplished together.

Thousands and thousands of hardworking Pennsylvanians have pitched in $5 here and $10 there to power Katie's campaign, and these small-dollar donations have built a historic campaign that was just last month endorsed by President Obama and Vice President Biden.

**Our momentum cannot be stopped, especially not by a derogatory remark from our primary opponent.** Let's send a message to Sestak that this race will be won through grassroots power. **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can now to make sure Katie wins on Primary Day?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3114869282748497920/3977264510665752576?refcode=e20160411&refcode2=e20160411nd&amount=25)**

Thank you for standing with Katie,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager **__ __**
---
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3114869282748497920/3977264510665752576?refcode=e20160411&refcode2=e20160411nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3114869282748497920/3905206916627824640).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Rob Portman
subject: RSVP for Super Saturday!
body:
| Peter -- Thousands of supporters across Ohio have given their time and money to make sure we are in the best position to win in November. Since May 1st, the campaign has contacted over 1,500,000 voters through our door-to-door and phone programs -- Jane and I can't thank you enough! Ted Strickland and his liberal allies have already spent over $2 million attacking me on TV. They are targeting us because they know the road to the White House and the Senate Majority runs through Ohio. We must keep up the hard work!

Last fall, our team contacted over 41,000 voters on our first Super Saturday statewide grassroots organizing day in October. Today we're announcing our second Super Saturday on April 23rd with a goal of contacting 50,000 voters in a single day!
To reach our goal, we need your help! [**Click here to RSVP at one of our events across the state on April 23rd.**](http://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_april?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=1 "RSVP now!") **[

](http://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_april?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=2)** On Super Saturday, our interns, volunteers, and staff will be making calls and knocking on doors across Ohio. Jane and I will be traveling across the state thanking our volunteers and interns -- and going door-to-door and making calls, too! I'll start the day with Jane in Brecksville, then head over to Toledo, then Dayton, and finish the day in Columbus. Jane will make stops in Youngstown, Bellville, and Terrace Park.

We'll have special guests, including Congressmen and statewide elected officials, at all of our offices. We're well on our way to building the best grassroots organization in Ohio history -- and we appreciate your support! In this election, Ohio has a choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland’s failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

**[Please sign up to volunteer with us on Saturday, April 23rd for our campaign's second Super Saturday!](http://www.robportman.com/super_saturday_april?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=3 "RSVP
now!")** All best, [

](http://www.robportman.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=4)Rob Portman
[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=5) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=6)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=7)[

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/q3_update?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=8)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ssapril&n=9). -=-=-

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: getting things done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

>
> Friend, the critical final push of this campaign begins now.
>
> On Thursday, thousands of Maryland voters will cast the first ballots of this race at Early Voting Centers across our state. We need to make sure that we reach each of them with Chris's positive message of unity and getting results before early voting begins. **[This is important. Your contribution of $25 or more will enable us to reach our Early Vote goal of $50,000 and enable a major campaign push to early voters in the coming days. Will you chip in now to ensure we have the funds we need to reach more voters?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d70/70cdc2ba/47d1dfd4/396eb99/1192695693/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em41116&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+This+is+important+Your+contribution+of+2&utm_campaign=em41116&source=em41116")**
>
> This is a battle over the future of the Democratic Party. Will we be able to move forward with real solutions to the challenges our nation faces or will we be stuck with rhetoric and no action?
>
> The headline of this morning's Washington Post editorial says it all -- **"a vote for Chris Van Hollen is a vote for getting things done "**. With your help we will be able to get that message out to voters so they understand the high stakes in this election.
>
> **[We have 48-hours to fully fund our Early Vote Fund. Will you make a contribution of $25 or whatever you can to our $50,000 Early Vote goal?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d70/70cdc2ba/47d1dfd4/396eb96/1192695693/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em41116&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+have+48hours+to+fully+fund+our+Early+&utm_campaign=em41116&source=em41116")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $15 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d70/70cdc2ba/47d1dfd4/396eb97/1192695693/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em41116&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+15+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em41116&source=em41116")** **[Donate $25 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d70/70cdc2ba/47d1dfd4/396eb94/1192695693/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em41116&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em41116&source=em41116")** **[Donate $50 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d70/70cdc2ba/47d1dfd4/396eb95/1192695693/VEsD/ Thanks for everything you do!
>

clean_body: | Friend, the critical final push of this campaign begins now. On Thursday, thousands of Maryland voters will cast the first ballots of this race at Early Voting Centers across our state. We need to make sure that we reach each of them with Chris's positive message of unity and getting results before early voting begins. "" This is a battle over the future of the Democratic Party. Will we be able to move forward with real solutions to the challenges our nation faces or will we be stuck with rhetoric and no action? The headline of this morning's Washington Post editorial says it all -- "a vote for Chris Van Hollen is a vote for getting things done ". With your help we will be able to get that message out to voters so they understand the high stakes in this election. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks for everything you do! Sheila O'Connell Campaign Manager Chris Van Hollen For Senate | ** ""** --- Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. name: Team Katie
subject: Sexist & offensive
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5097442438738345984/2320221322770120704?refcode=e20160411.2&refcode2=e20160411.2nd&amount=25)
---
**_Sestak_** : "Why win a seat, but you have to win it through a prostituted way?"
[**We have to answer this offensive comment. Chip in to elect Katie >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5097442438738345984/2320221322770120704?refcode=e20160411.2&refcode2=e20160411.2nd&amount=25)

Friend, primary opponent Joe Sestak said this about Katie's campaign for U.S. Senate:
**_" Why win a seat, but you have to win it through a prostituted way?"
\-- Joe Sestak, at a PennLive Editorial Board meeting, 4/8/16_** First of all, **this language is sexist, offensive, and unbecoming of a Senate candidate.**

Second of all, what is he talking about? The thousands and thousands of supporters Katie has worked hard to gain over months of campaigning? Nurses, steelworkers, teachers, and firefighters who are backing her? The LGBT community and champions of the environment who are standing beside her? Katie receiving endorsements from President Obama and Vice President Joe Biden?

**We need to show Joe Sestak that his inflammatory statements are no match for Katie 's grassroots organization. [Pitch in now to support Katie and make sure she has the resources to close the gap and win on Primary Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5097442438738345984/2320221322770120704?refcode=e20160411.2&refcode2=e20160411.2nd&amount=25)**

We're facing the greatest threat to women's health and rights in a generation. Donald Trump has called for "punishment" for women exercising their constitutionally protected right to choose. Ted Cruz and Pat Toomey have voted against the Violence Against Women Act and voted repeatedly for defunding Planned Parenthood. It's a sad day when we see that same kind of hateful rhetoric show up in our race to elect a Democratic candidate for Senate.

Language like this from politicians from either party only serves to amplify the challenges women face. It's a serious issue and it's simply unacceptable.

We deserve a champion for women's rights in Washington. Katie may be the underdog in this race, but she's working hard to win every vote -- by being the candidate Pennsylvania needs. And nothing Joe Sestak can say will change that.

[**Show Sestak who 's backing Katie -- YOU -- by pitching in to help her win her primary. Every dollar counts.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5097442438738345984/2320221322770120704?refcode=e20160411.2&refcode2=e20160411.2nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Team Katie __ __
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5097442438738345984/2320221322770120704?refcode=e20160411.2&refcode2=e20160411.2nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5097442438738345984/2248163728732192768).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Sestak
subject: Incredible: attacked for a vote taken more than a year after Joe left Congress
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c57/613643506/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

All, It's incredible, but the "PolitiFact" that the **Democrat** special interest group cites in its attack ad is about **a vote by a Republican congressman -- cast 14 months after Joe left Congress!** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c56/613643506/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2b1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
This is unbelievable and it is outrageous. _Citizens United_ has caused so much damage to politicians' integrity that they will say anything. So much so that Democrat power brokers in DC are now not only using corporate contributions to attack Joe, but are also using a Politifact about a vote taken long after Joe left Congress! We are not making this up!
[Please contribute, now, to help by any amount you can. ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c55/613643506/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p1&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
Maybe now it becomes obvious why Joe refused the DSCC's and its Senators' offer to accept their direction of "Sestak, whenever I tell you anything, the only answer is to be yes." And maybe now it lends even more meaning to **The Philadelphia Inquirer's** endorsement of Joe yesterday for "his willingness to put principle above party."
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c54/613643506/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2b2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
[Please contribute right away if you would, $15, $25, $50, $100, $250 to ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c53/613643506/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[rebut](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c53/613643506/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[ the ad's ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c53/613643506/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[falsehoods](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c53/613643506/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")[ -- because principle does matter...particularly as our political establishment has put our nation's character at risk, unfortunately, it seems in both parties.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c53/613643506/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p2&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
\- Team Sestak

* * *
Peter,
Tomorrow, an outside special interest group supporting Joe's primary election opponent begins airing a negative ad falsely attacking Joe.
Despite the fact that Congressman Sestak was, is, and will always be a proven fighter for preserving and expanding Social Security and Medicare, **this outside interest group said it is putting up a $1 million TV ad making false claims that have already been proven inaccurate by independent fact-checkers. **
[Please help Joe push back with a rebuttal ad - based on the true facts listed below - by directly funding our response ad with $10, $25, $100, whatever you can do now, please... as this takes funds away from our positive ads!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c52/613643506/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p3&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c51/613643506/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FBb3&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
_These are the facts:_
* **" Not ****accurate** " said ABC's WTAE Action News 4 in Pittsburgh after "digging into the truth behind the claims" about Joe's record on Social Security and Medicare.
* WGAL in Lancaster **agreed with ABC 's assessment that the claims are false.**
* The _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ said the allegation was **" plainly misleading."**
* In fact, the _Post-Gazette_ said **" Mr. Sestak's answer did not [even] mention Social Security"** as the group claims it did.
* And Philadelphia NPR affiliate WHYY agreed with the _Post-Gazette_ , finding that** "Sestak didn't actually talk about Social Security in the interview in question."**

Peter, again, please help Joe push back as we must unfortunately take funds from our positive ads to now counter the negative one that is falsely misrepresenting Joe's integrity of service to the people of Pennsylvania. [We ask you to chip in the maximum amount you are able so that we can respond tomorrow!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c50/613643506/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2p4&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c5f/613643506/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0411FB2b4&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,500")
---
Warmly,
Team Sestak

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c5e/613643506/VEsHAQ/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c5d/613643506/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c5c/613643506/VEsHAw/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719af2/3476a20e/d8aebdf/27422c5b/613643506/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Equal Pay
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
My mother was one of the hardest working people I've ever known. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e828/4129285517/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/equal-pay?utm_source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&utm_campaign=equalpay&utm_medium=ema") Friend, | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e828/4129285517/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/equal-pay?utm_source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&utm_campaign=equalpay&utm_medium=ema")
---
Each generation of my family has been led by a strong woman who worked tirelessly to provide for our family. My mother, Sylvia -- the family's culture buff -- taught me and my siblings so much about the world. She instilled in us idealism and passion for social justice that has guided my life. I wouldn't be who I am today had it not been for my mother, one of the hardest-working people I've ever known.
Tomorrow is Equal Pay Day, and women in Wisconsin still earn nearly 79 cents for every dollar a man earns for doing the same work -- and that gap is even wider for women of color. My mother would be the first to tell you how disappointing that is.
**[Add your name if you agree: Women deserve equal pay for equal work.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e828/4129285517/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/equal-pay?utm_source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&utm_campaign=equalpay&utm_medium=ema")**
A few months ago, our family welcomed my beautiful granddaughter into the world. Her name is Sylvia, just like my mother. I can't wait to see the person that my granddaughter grows to become: I'm sure she'll be brilliant, thoughtful, and incredibly hardworking -- just like her namesake.
As a grandpa, I want to help guide my granddaughter into a world where she and her peers have an equal playing field, where she can spend her time focusing on her dreams instead of worrying about what's holding her back -- like whether she's making the same for her work as her male counterparts.
There are common-sense things that our country can do to address this, like passing equal pay legislation, raising the minimum wage, guaranteeing paid family leave, and ensuring access to quality, affordable women's healthcare.
Unfortunately, my opponent, Senator Ron Johnson, disagrees: He has said that equal pay legislation "does more harm than good." He's on the wrong side of history, and on the wrong side of women across America.
**[It's a no-brainer: Women should have every opportunity to succeed. It's time that we pass equal pay legislation.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e828/4129285517/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/equal-pay?utm_source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&utm_campaign=equalpay&utm_medium=ema")**
I hope you'll join me in honoring Equal Pay Day by recommitting to fight for equal pay for equal work. Together, we can make a difference for the hardworking women across America.
Thanks for standing with me on this.
Russ Feingold
[ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e828/4129285517/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/equal-pay?utm_source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&source=ema_2016-04-11_equalpay&utm_campaign=equalpay&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e829/4129285517/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e826/4129285517/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e827/4129285517/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf425f/1c469400/5d1506e/351e824/4129285517/VEsP/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---
All content (C) 2016 Russ for Wisconsin, All Rights Reserved
Russ for Wisconsin
PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562

name: John Weaver
subject: Wow
body:
Gov. John Kasich just wrapped up two Town Hall events aired by
CNN and Fox News.

Peter, Gov. John Kasich just
wrapped up two Town Hall events aired by CNN and Fox News.

To sum it up in one word:
Presidential

You've heard it over and over but
it's worth repeating: John Kasich is the ONLY Republican who can
defeat Hillary Clinton and he's also the only candidate prepared
to be President on Day One.

Agree?

Chip in with a $25 or more
contribution right now to help fund our New York get-out-the-vote
programs. The Primary is on April 19th!

And don't forget to tune into
Gov. Kasich's "Two Paths" speech Tuesday morning.

Gov. John Kasich Speech - "Two
Paths"
Tuesday, April 12th - 10:30AM EDT
Watch Live:
JohnKasich.com/TwoPaths

Thank you for your support!

John Weaver
Chief Strategist
JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[**Chip in $10 or more right now to get your sticker.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyMDk1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNzEwMjkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Don't forget
body:
#
I think that many in the media who are covering our campaign forget where we came from.
Today they are covering the fact that we have won eight of the last nine contests, and are building for a significant election in New York. They hang on our every word, and breathlessly report on the campaign like it's a baseball game or soap opera.
This is very different from where we were when we started this campaign less than a year ago. We were dismissed as a "fringe" campaign, one that few thought had a chance, and one to which not many in the media paid much attention.
**The difference? Your support.**
[**Your $2.70 contribution, paired with millions like it, is the difference in this election. It's because of your support that this election is now about raising the minimum wage, fighting climate change, and taking back our country from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/easy-to-forget?refcode=em160411-nd-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/easy-to-forget?refcode=em160411-nd-full")
We have only come this far because we have millions of supporters, millions of votes, and millions of donations. This is a campaign powered by people, much to the chagrin of the billionaire class and the dismay of the media.
Almost a year ago, we were lucky to have a handful of reporters cover our events. But then something started happening: as our supporters told their friends and family about what we're doing, we started to catch fire.
In the face of one of the best-organized political machines in modern American history, we are doing what no one thought possible: winning. Let's keep winning in New York's primary.
[**Add a $2.70 contribution now and help us continue this incredible momentum.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/easy-to-forget?refcode=em160411-nd-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/easy-to-forget?refcode=em160411-nd-full")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/easy-to-forget?refcode=em160411-nd-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/easy-to-forget?refcode=em160411-nd-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
